caption:
A carpenter we work with builds feature walls that go viral. Then the DMs bury him.

One reel pops off and suddenly there's 80 'how much?' messages — and he's on the tools, not glued to his phone. By the time he replied, the lead was gone. So we put a speed-to-lead system on his Instagram: every DM gets an instant reply, shares the pricing basics, and books consults with the serious ones.

The reel keeps working after he's put the phone down.

Content brings the leads — does your inbox lose them? Free audit — link in bio. 👇

#carpenter #featurewall #joinery #tradesbusiness #ukandireland
